_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of a Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) environment and processes.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continuous integration principles, automated testing integration, artifact management, deployment automation patterns, and environment promotion strategies.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.620), TF-T-004 (TF, cosine: 0.617).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.698). Shared vocabulary: [cd, ci, continuous, deployment, environment, integration, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.912, R=0.875). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of a Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) environment" and "Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline concepts for data and AI projects, including continu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.707 ≈ STS 0.698 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cd, ci, continuous, deployment, environment] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 33.3%. Shared tokens: [cd, ci, continuous, deployment, environment, integration, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [processes]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, automated, automation, concepts, data].
